new_value: {"notes":"HUMAN: T-Deck keyboard/trackball/UI integration: I2C/GPIO quadrature for inputs, LVGL with Zephyr input events (INPUT_EV_*, lvgl_indev), enforce no blocking in hot paths (queues, non-blocking I2C, k_poll), use board-specific overlays (lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck/t_deck.overlay) and Kconfig fragments for puck (lichen/apps/puck/boards/t_deck.conf) and gateway (lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck.conf), dedicated trackball driver in lichen/drivers/input/trackball/ following Zephyr conventions. Pending human confirmation before any impl. Leave open."}
